article_meta.title: Why the US needs China's rare earths16 October 2025ShareSaveAyeshea PereraAsia Digital Editor, Singapore ShareSaveGetty

reasoning: The model returned an empty array for an article that contains several defensible instances of author-level bias. The article has loaded language like 'chokehold,' 'dealt a major blow,' 'precious metal' (rare earths are not metals in the precious metal sense), 'adversarial tone Trump has struck,' and structural framing that presents China's dominance in particularly threatening terms. The model missed these instances, constituting a false negative pattern.

The empty array misses all of these.
